questions.question: What APT group was attributed to the development infrastructure attack?
questions.expected_answer: INC-2024-003: TTPs matched APT29 (likely state-sponsored). The attack involved supply chain compromise (event-stream), crypto mining on CI server, DNS tunneling, and xz-utils backdoor (CVE-2024-3094).

questions.question: How was the AWS key exposure in INC-2024-004 resolved?
questions.expected_answer: Key immediately revoked, CloudTrail audit showed key was used 3 times before revocation but no customer data was accessed (only listed buckets). Git-secrets hook deployed to all repos with mandatory pre-commit scanning.

[security_logs_024] | Incident Report INC-2024-004: Cloud credential exposure in public repository. Status: active. Severity: high. Affected systems: AWS-PROD-ACCOUNT, S3-CUSTOMER-DATA. IOCs: AKIA*, prod-customer-data. CVEs: None identified. Timeline: 2024-03-17 12:00: AWS key found in public GitHub repository; 2024-03-17 12:05: Key immediately revoked via AWS console; 2024-03-17 12:15: CloudTrail audit initiated for key usage. [incidents_033] | Incident update INC-2024-004: Status changed from active to investigating. Detail: Key was used 3 times from unknown IP before revocation. [incidents_038] | Incident update INC-2024-004: Status changed from investigating to contained. Detail: S3 access logs show no customer data accessed; key only listed buckets. [incidents_045] | Incident update INC-2024-004: Status changed from contained to closed. Detail: Git-secrets hook deployed to all repos; mandatory pre-commit scanning. [incidents_050]
questions.reasoning: The agent's answer contains all key resolution steps from the expected answer: immediate key revocation, CloudTrail audit showing 3 uses before revocation, confirmation that no customer data was accessed (only bucket listing), and deployment of git-secrets hooks with mandatory pre-commit scanning. The agent includes additional contextual information (timestamps, status changes, IPs) from the incident logs, but the core resolution details are complete and accurate.
